violations.text: (Drinks) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
